top_signals.title: ECB Hikes for First Time Since 2023 as Inflation Heats Up
top_signals.summary: The European Central Bank raised interest rates for the first time in almost three years, concluding it can no longer wait out the Iran war as inflation pressures intensify.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: ECB Hikes Interest Rates for First Time Since 2023
top_signals.why_it_matters: Central-bank repricing affecting yields, FX, liquidity and equities.

top_signals.title: Air India 171 Crash Report Delayed
top_signals.summary: One year after the crash of Air India 171, investigators are still searching for definitive answers. The final report has been delayed as probes continue into the aircraft's engines and systems. (Source: Bloomberg)
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Hungary to scrap Orban-era crypto rules that carried jail terms: reports
top_signals.summary: Hungary will decriminalize crypto trading, reversing Orban-era rules that carried jail terms and led platforms like Revolut to suspend services.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Digital asset volatility and institutional crypto positioning changes.

top_signals.title: Max severity Ivanti Sentry vulnerability now exploited in attacks
top_signals.summary: Attackers are now targeting a recently patched maximum-severity flaw in Ivanti Sentry, enabling them to execute code with root privileges on Internet-exposed secure mobile gateways. [...]
